batch: Batch149 — P0/P1 Maximum Closure & Security Cookie Hardening
phase: P0/P1 local evidence maximization while hosted/public proof remains externally gated
purpose: Push P0/P1 as far as this repo can be pushed without a real Vercel APP_URL/GitHub Actions Node24 run: harden CSRF cookie handling, add a single max-closure runner/report, preserve hosted/public blockers, and prevent local artifacts from being overclaimed as production-ready. The verify script runs source/data/batch149 validation before this runner, so the runner itself focuses on runtime/security/hosted-dry evidence to avoid duplicating the heaviest source registry output. Runner commands are intentionally limited to the strongest runtime/security evidence commands because smoke/source/typecheck/hosted-dry commands are run separately and can exceed constrained chat tool wall-time when duplicated.

scope.singleBatchScope: P0/P1 closure evidence and security-cookie hardening only

securityHardening.summary: CSRF cookie is now explicitly httpOnly while the token remains available through the JSON response for the client header, reducing accidental script-side cookie exposure without breaking the double-submit check.
Logout clears the CSRF cookie with the same httpOnly/sameSite/secure posture so stale write tokens do not linger under a weaker cookie shape.

maxClosureCommands.command: GIAOAN_SKIP_REDUNDANT_NEXT_BUILD_CHECKS=1 GIAOAN_BUILD_TRACE_GRACE_MS=0 GIAOAN_BUILD_ARTIFACT_READY_GRACE_MS=0 npm run build

hostedPublicStillRequired: GitHub Actions Node24 run with CI provenance.
Real browser visual smoke PNG screenshots for canonical viewports.
Downloaded artifact set from one GitHub Actions run validated by closure dossier + authenticity lock.
Production DB/session/security/legal review before public rollout or production-ready claims.

allowedAfterRunnerPass: P0/P1 local/source/runtime max-closure candidate in the current audit environment.
P1 CSRF cookie posture hardened at source level.
Hosted proof readiness strengthened but not externally closed.
forbiddenUntilHostedPass: visual smoke passed without PNG screenshots
